title: Evernorth Holdings files Form S-4 with SEC to list on Nasdaq under ticker $XRPN via SPAC merger
message_html: Evernorth Holdings files Form S-4 with SEC to list on Nasdaq under ticker $XRPN via SPAC merger ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: Evernorth Holdings files Form S-4 with SEC to list on Nasdaq under ticker $XRPN via SPAC merger. The billion-dollar $XRP treasury vehicle will actively deploy capital to DeFi, lending, and validator participation.
